523aa1620a7e6f8b9571fdb37fc8665c.final_output:
According to [Source 3], Sachin Rekhi, A2A stands for "Autocomplete to Augmentation". This refers to a progression from using AI-powered tools primarily as a means of code completion (autocomplete) to treating them as a collaborative partner that can be used to augment and improve specific aspects of product development.

In other words, as mentioned in the context, most Product Managers plateau at Level 2-3 because they fail to treat AI coding tools as a meaningful collaborator, instead relying on their limited capabilities for autocompletion.

metas.author: Jason Lemkin (@jasonlk)
metas.title: Can never go back to working without AI agents
